description: Rename-heavy diff: large-scale package reorganization where files moved between directories. All files live under a single top-level directory after rename — directory strategy collapses to 1 group (bad). Extension produces 2-3 groups (.go, .md — unbalanced). Chunks strategy should win for balanced splitting.
rationale: All 12 files land in a single directory (pkg/newpkg). Directory strategy produces 1 group (splitScore = 0.33). Extension strategy produces 2 groups (.go=11, .md=1 — poor balance). Chunks strategy with default maxPerGroup divides into balanced groups scoring high on split and balance. This represents a rename/reorganization where the original directory structure is gone.
